records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Northern Union Territory- Central Siberia, Sealed Crevice.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Northern Union Territory- Central Siberia, Sealed Crevice.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Northern Union Territory- Central Siberia, Sealed Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ground Zero refers to the Crevice that looks like a meteorite crater in the middle of Siberia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ground Zero refers to the Crevice that looks like a meteorite crater in the middle of Siberia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ground Zero refers to the Crevice that looks like a meteorite crater in the middle of Siberia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the Administration out of its reach, the Northern Union's army is managing it as they please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the Administration out of its reach, the Northern Union's army is managing it as they please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the Administration out of its reach, the Northern Union's army is managing it as they please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the big wall blocking our path is a device the Northern Union developed called the <color=#ffd34c>Valve</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the big wall blocking our path is a device the Northern Union developed called the <color=#ffd34c>Valve</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the big wall blocking our path is a device the Northern Union developed called the <color=#ffd34c>Valve</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It blocks the entry of outsiders while also preventing the Corruption ray that is flowing out the Crevice from leaking to the outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It blocks the entry of outsiders while also preventing the Corruption ray that is flowing out the Crevice from leaking to the outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It blocks the entry of outsiders while also preventing the Corruption ray that is flowing out the Crevice from leaking to the outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How much longer are you going to keep up with these meaningless monologues?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How much longer are you going to keep up with these meaningless monologues?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How much longer are you going to keep up with these meaningless monologues?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you tell me that you could open that door in seconds?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you tell me that you could open that door in seconds?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you tell me that you could open that door in seconds?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Just give me a sec...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Just give me a sec...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Just give me a sec...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. There wasn't this stupid mechanical lock the last time I was here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. There wasn't this stupid mechanical lock the last time I was here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. There wasn't this stupid mechanical lock the last time I was here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did they switch vendors to a cheaper one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did they switch vendors to a cheaper one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did they switch vendors to a cheaper one?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Give me just a second. I'll get it open
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Give me just a second. I'll get it open
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Give me just a second. I'll get it open
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: No time. Step aside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No time. Step aside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No time. Step aside.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey...! I said, give me a second. Things always go south if we do it your
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hey...! I said, give me a second. Things always go south if we do it your
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hey...! I said, give me a second. Things always go south if we do it your
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think that's a lot of soldiers just to guard a door?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think that's a lot of soldiers just to guard a door?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think that's a lot of soldiers just to guard a door?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not panicking. They knew we were coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not panicking. They knew we were coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not panicking. They knew we were coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... It's fine. They won't shoot as long as we don't do anything rash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... It's fine. They won't shoot as long as we don't do anything rash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... It's fine. They won't shoot as long as we don't do anything rash.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I mean, just look at us. If we pretend to be lost kids, then
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I mean, just look at us. If we pretend to be lost kids, then
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I mean, just look at us. If we pretend to be lost kids, then
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: KYAAAAH!
records.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAAAH!
records.m_Talk_FRA: KYAAAAH!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did they just shoot at us?! You've got to be kidding me!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did they just shoot at us?! You've got to be kidding me!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did they just shoot at us?! You've got to be kidding me!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Paradox! You're sure that my memories are here, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Paradox! You're sure that my memories are here, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Paradox! You're sure that my memories are here, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: While I stop them, you go ahead and connect <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color>!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While I stop them, you go ahead and connect <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color>!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While I stop them, you go ahead and connect <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color>!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That thing? You mean Straw Rope? Nuh-uh! Never! That requires super focus, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That thing? You mean Straw Rope? Nuh-uh! Never! That requires super focus, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That thing? You mean Straw Rope? Nuh-uh! Never! That requires super focus, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do as I say if you don't want to die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do as I say if you don't want to die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do as I say if you don't want to die!
